# Tech Trend Mobile BZ

Tech Trend Mobile BZ is a Belize City mobile phone shop at 1224 Blue Marlin Drive. The shop sells tested pre-owned iPhones and Samsung Galaxy phones with warranty, pickup, Belize City delivery, and countrywide shipping.

Primary website: https://techtrend.silvatech.bz/
WhatsApp: +501 656-9915
Instagram: https://instagram.com/techtrend100
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/people/TECH-TREND/61575110823443/

Current public catalog snapshot, checked July 6, 2026:
- iPhone 14 128GB blue, BZD 1150
- iPhone 14 128GB purple, BZD 1150
- iPhone 12 128GB blue, BZD 750
- iPhone X 256GB black, BZD 529

Customers should message Tech Trend on WhatsApp before payment to confirm availability, photos, delivery, pickup, and payment details.
